title: Never been in love + Vietnamese family fuck-over premonition (2022)
html:
Never been in love + Vietnamese family fuck-over premonition (2022)

Source: 2022-09-04 Apple Note. Two-line confession + a 10:20 PM premonition about being scammed by a host family in Vietnam.

TL;DR

  • "I have never really been in love" — direct admission, age 19, OSU sophomore. Sets the baseline for the eventual Emily arc starting late 2025.
  • "I need to find out about my love language and what that even means. What is the study behind it." — explicit research-task on himself; love-as-domain-to-be-studied framing.
  • Coda: "10:20 most likely about to get fucked over by the Vietnamese family that helped me" — premonition during travel, no follow-up in the corpus on what actually happened.
  • Cross-temporal: this is the earliest never-been-in-love confession in the corpus, pre-Sam, pre-Jo, pre-Emily; a clean baseline before any of those arcs begin.
  • Tone: studied-detachment about love sits oddly next to a real-time scam-premonition — Yahir's voice oscillating between essayist and traveler-on-edge.

Connections

  • the emily arc — the eventual answer
  • vietnam
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026
  • 2022 01 07 failure is fitting in — adjacent OSU-era loneliness articulation
  • osu

related.label: Failure means not fitting in — frequency-tribes thesis (2022)
